description: Frozen canonical Nile-USDT bridge deployment config. config_hash equals the LIVE deployed vault CONFIG_HASH (TMckEpYx…, reason_tag 39048, real SP1 verifier, R6 false-tolerant safe-transfer); all three stacks (vault, prover, wallet) must use these values. reason_tag is 39048 (39050 collides with SpherePaymentData's CBOR tag). Redeployed 2026-07-02 with vkey 0x00d75299… (guest relation decodes the SpherePaymentData envelope) and an explicit energy stipend on the vault's low-level TRC20 transfer calls (TVM doesn't reliably forward all remaining energy to a bare nested .call()). Redeploy with contracts/tron/scripts/deploy-nile.js real-vault <asset> <vkey>.
